items: Welcome by the School Board President, Cecilia Márquez
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda

If you have a public comment related to a Regular Board Meeting item, please post it on the links available under Public Content prior to the Regular Board Meeting or immediately upon the meeting opening.
Approval of Bond Program Consent Items
Approval of Measure T Bond Program Tracking List of Items Under $20k
Approval of New Buildings, Modernization and Sitework, Bid Package G, Change Order #14 to the Agreement with Rodan Builders for Garfield Community School
Approval of Proposal for Asphalt Replacement with Dryco for Orion Alternative School (Formerly John Gill School)
Approval of Proposal for New Asphalt and Storage Container Replacement with Dryco for Adelante Selby Spanish Immersion School
First Reading and Discussion of Board Policy 6158 - Independent Study
Approval of School Assignments and School Committee Assignments for Board Members for the remainder of the 2022-23 School Year
Ratification of Warrant Registers, December 1, 2022 - December 31, 2022
Approval of Addendum to 2022-23 Measure U Application for Adelante Selby Spanish Immersion
Approval of Governing Board's Initial Proposal for Negotiations with The California School Employees Association, Chapter V, for 2022-2023
Third Reading and Final Approval of Board Bylaw 9100 - Organization
Acceptance of California School Employees Association Chapter V Sunshine Proposal for 2022-2023
Approval of Local Interagency Agreement(s) to Provide Education and Training to Credential Candidates
Approval of Update on planned expenditures for the Effective Educator Grant
Report from Board Members and Superintendent
Other Business/Suggested Items For Future Agenda
Possible Other Business/Suggested Items for Future Agenda
Changes to the Board Meetings Calendar

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 9.1 (Approval of Addendum to 2022-23 Measure U Application for Adelante Selby Spanish Immersion) was moved to consent agenda during Changes to the Agenda section. Board President stated: 'We could move 9.1 to a consent if we. If that's okay. That's just a measure you addendum.'
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I please get a motion to approve the consent items including 9.1? So moved. Seconded. All in favor? Aye.
